title: Five Day Lover
writer: Françoise Parturier, Daniel Boulanger, Philippe de Broca
actors: Jean Seberg, Micheline Presle, Jean-Pierre Cassel
plot: As the lover of Madeleine, Antoine meets her best friend Claire. Antoine pretends to be rich, while Claire tells him that she is married to a diplomat. Both lovers enjoy these lies until one day Madeleine discovers the betrayal.
